title: fields
description: All available fields in service. FID = Field ID Number.

Exchange.description: Field ID # 20. Exchange ISO-Code. Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

product.description: Field ID # 4. Product identifier. Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Bid_Tick.description: Field ID # 518. Current bid tick direction. Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Bid_Close_Date.description: Field ID # 1062. Official Closing Bid Date

Bid_Close_Vol.description: Field ID # 296. Official Closing Bid Volume

Bid_Exch.description: Field ID # 506. Exchange of the current bid price. Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Ask_Close_Date.description: Field ID # 1064. Official Closing ask Date

Ask_Close_Vol.description: Field ID # 297. Official Closing ask Volume

Ask_Exch.description: Field ID # 606. Exchange of the current ask price.  Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Short_Sale_Indicator.description: Field ID # 277. Flag to indicate if a security is restricted from being sold short

Quote_Condition.description: Field ID # 38. Current Quote Condition.  Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Last_Price.description: Field ID # 50. Official last trade price

Last_Time.description: Field ID # 383. Official last traded time

Last_Vol.description: Field ID # 31. Official last traded volume

Last_Tick.description: Field ID # 25. Official last tick. Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Official_Close.description: Field ID # 526. Official Close/Close Range 1 Price

Official_Close_Time.description: Field ID # 1065. Official Close/Close Range 1 Time

Last_Exch.description: Field ID # 33. Official last traded exchange. Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Traded_Condition.description: Field ID # 1098. Last traded trade condition

Percent_Change.description: Field ID # 816. Official last percentage change

Premkt_Price.description: Field ID # 1019. Unofficial last premarket trade price

Premkt_Time.description: Field ID # 1075. Unofficial last premarket traded time

Premkt_Vol.description: Field ID # 1832. Unofficial last premarket traded volume

Premkt_CVol.description: Field ID # 1836. Unofficial last premarket cumulative volume

Postmkt_Price.description: Field ID # 2029. Unofficial last post market trade price

Postmkt_Time.description: Field ID # 1076. Unofficial last post market traded time

Postmkt_Vol.description: Field ID # 1860. Unofficial last post market traded volume

Postmkt_Cvol.description: Field ID # 1864. Unofficial last post market cumulative volume

Offbook_Cum_Vol.description: Field ID # 528. Off Book Cumulative Volume

Official_Bid_Close.description: Field ID # 448. The bid close price of today

Official_Ask_Close.description: Field ID # 476. The ask close price of today

Mid_Time.description: Field ID # 135. Current mid price time

Vwap.description: Field ID # 780. Volume Weighted Average Price

Prev_Close.description: Field ID # 208. Previous trading days Close

Close_Date.description: Field ID # 1051. Previous trading days Closing Date

Prev_Close_Unadj.description: Field ID # 892. Unadjusted Previous trading days Close

Prev_Close_2.description: Field ID # 1172. Previous trading days Close  late rollover[1]

Prev_Close_Unadj_2.description: Field ID # 1176. Unadjusted Previous trading days Close  late rollover

Open.description: Field ID # 158. The Open Range 1 or Open Price

High.description: Field ID # 107. Current high for the day

Low.description: Field ID # 307. Current low for the day

Auto_Trade_Vwap.description: Field ID # 637. VWAP including only order book (automatic) trades

Auto_Trade_Cvol.description: Field ID # 635. Cumulative Volume calculated on all automated trading volumes for order-based segments

Auto_Trade_Count.description: Field ID # 636. Trade Quantity including only order book (automatic) trades

Premkt_Net_Change.description: Field ID # 896. Net change in pre-market session(US stocks only)

Premkt_Percent_Change.description: Field ID # 897. Percent change in pre-market session(US stocks only)

Closing_Vol.description: Field ID # 1345. Volume of the closing trade

Primary_Market.description: Field ID # 1517. FactSet Exchange Code of primary market for instrument. Determined by highest trading volume over a 3-day calendar period

Iso_Country_Exchange.description: Field ID # 1621. Three Letter Country Code from ISO-3166

Premkt_Exch.description: Field ID # 1743. Premarket Exchange. Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Postmkt_Exch.description: Field ID # 1744. Post Market Exchange. Enumeration in Data Service Manual.

Fref_Security_type.description: Field ID # 1751. The Security type returned by FREF_SECURITY_type

Security_Sub_type.description: Field ID # 1762. Sub type of the security populated for funds right now

Postmkt_Net_Change.description: Field ID # 1881. Post Market Net Change

Postmkt_Percent_Change.description: Field ID # 1882. Post Market Percent Change.

Shares_Outstanding.description: Field ID # 29. Total number of shares outstanding

Security_Status.description: Field ID # 2800. Security Status or Halt Indicator. Enumeration in Data manual

Gmt_Offset.description: Field ID # 389. GMT Offset in Minutes

Financial_Status.description: Field ID # 1896. Financial Status Enumeration Table

Feed_Currency.description: Field ID # 1182. Currency the Exchange sends the prices to FactSet in

Order_Lot_Size.description: Field ID # 427. Number of securities in a lot

Trade_Lot_Size.description: Field ID # 1335. The minimum number of lots required to trade

Tick_Pilot_Eff_Date.description: Field ID # 1508. Tick Pilot effective day

Avg_30Day_Vol.description: Field ID # 709. Average cumulative volume for last 30 days

Avg_5Day_Vol.description: Field ID # 719. Average cumulative volume over last 5 trading days

High_52Week_Date.description: Field ID # 1220. 52 Week High Price Date

Low_52Week_Date.description: Field ID # 1295. 52 Week Low Price Date

Total_Return_3M.description: Field ID # 746. 3 Month return for US mutual funds

Total_Return_52W.description: Field ID # 747. 52-Week Total Return for US mutual funds
